'''Lee Penny''' is a former [[Scotland national rugby league team|Scotland]] international [[rugby league]] footballer.<ref name="Statistics at rugbyleagueproject.org">{{cite web|url=http://www.rugbyleagueproject.org/players/lee-penny/summary.html|title=Statistics at rugbyleagueproject.org|publisher=rugbyleagueproject.org|date=31 December 2017|accessdate=1 January 2018}}</ref>

Penny was born in Wigan in 1974, he attended St Cuthberts Infant and Junior School and St Thomas More High School.

Penny played in the {{rlp|fb}} position and was a [[Scotland national rugby league team|Scotland]] international and played at the [[2000 Rugby League World Cup]].

Penny played at [[Warrington Wolves]] before moving to [[Salford Red Devils|Salford City Reds]].

He then moved on to play Rugby Union for Vale of Lune RUFC in North 1 where he spent 2 seasons.
